message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column iter/to_vec/missing-predicates/apply_bool (frankenpandas-2nvj)

Five small Column helpers that fill out the introspection surface:

- iter_values() — `std::slice::Iter<'_, Scalar>` over the column's
  scalars in position order. Convenience over `values().iter()`.
- to_vec() — owned `Vec<Scalar>` materialization (pd.Series.to_list
  shortcut, but named to match Rust conventions).
- has_any_missing() — short-circuit scan for the first missing
  value; faster than materializing an isnull() Bool column.
- all_missing() — empty columns return true (vacuous), matching
  ValidityMask::all's empty-case convention.
- apply_bool(predicate) — predicate → Bool column specialization of
  map. Missing inputs map to Bool(false) by default; callers who
  need null propagation should use map() and emit Null(NaN)
  explicitly.

Co-lands frankenpandas-gkz5 (to_vec), iz9a (has_any_missing/
all_missing), 7j8r (apply_bool).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
